# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-a-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: service-b
      namespace: microservices
  allowedPorts:
    - port: 8080
  serviceAccountRef:
    name: service-a-sa

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-b-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: service-a
      namespace: microservices
  allowedPorts:
    - port: 8080
  serviceAccountRef:
    name: service-b-sa
